tasks.label: Deploy (development)
args: functions -q _tide_report_uninstall && _tide_report_uninstall; fisher remove MrBasa/TideReport 2>/dev/null; fisher remove "${workspaceFolder}" 2>/dev/null; fisher install "${workspaceFolder}"; source $__fish_config_dir/conf.d/tide_report.fish; _tide_report_install
